_description: Replace task() calls with @subagent_type shorthand syntax for gsd subagent types

rules._comment: 1a. Multiline task() with variable prompt, model, description (standard 4-line format)
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with variable prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 1b. Multiline task() with quoted prompt, model, description
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with quoted prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 2a. Single-line task() with variable prompt, model, description
rules.description: Replace single-line task() with variable prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 2b. Single-line task() with quoted prompt, model, description
rules.description: Replace single-line task() with quoted prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 3. task() with triple-quoted prompt: task(prompt="""...""", subagent_type="gsd-xxx", ...)
rules.description: Replace task() with triple-quoted prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 4a. Multiline task() with variable prompt, description only (no model)
rules.description: Replace multiline task() without model to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 4b. Single-line task() with variable prompt, description only (no model)
rules.description: Replace single-line task() without model to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 5a. Multiline task() with variable prompt, extra args (isolation etc), description, no model
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with extra args, no model, to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 6. task() with subagent_type first and triple-quoted prompt
rules.description: Replace task() with subagent_type first and triple-quoted prompt

rules._comment: 7. Multiline task() with expression prompt (containing + operator)
rules.description: Replace task() with expression prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 8. Multiline task() with variable prompt and trailing comment
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with comment to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 9. Multiline task() with variable prompt, trailing comment, model, description
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with comment and model to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 10. Multiline task() with quoted prompt containing newlines, subagent_type, model (no description)
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with multiline quoted prompt, no description

rules._comment: 11. Multiline task() with quoted prompt containing newlines, subagent_type, model, description
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with multiline quoted prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 12. Multiline task() with subagent_type first, model, extra args, description, quoted prompt at end
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with subagent_type first, prompt last to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 13. Multiline task() with subagent_type first, extra args, multiline quoted prompt at end (map-codebase pattern)
rules.description: Replace task() subagent_type first with prompt last (map-codebase pattern)

rules._comment: 14. Indented task() with subagent_type first, model, isolation, multiline quoted prompt (execute-phase deep indent)
rules.description: Replace indented task() with subagent_type first, isolation, prompt last (execute-phase deep indent)

rules._comment: 15. Multiline task() with quoted prompt containing newlines, subagent_type, model, extra args, description
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with extra arg (isolation) between model and description

rules._comment: 16. Multiline task() with expression prompt (multi-line + concatenation), subagent_type, model, description
rules.description: Replace multiline task() with multi-line expression prompt to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 17. Prose: 'spawn a task() in parallel' → @subagent reference
rules.replacement: spawn a relevant subagent using `@subagent prompt` syntax in parallel
rules.description: Replace prose 'spawn a task() in parallel' with @subagent reference

rules._comment: 18. task() with subagent_type="general" referencing gsd-advisor-researcher → @gsd-advisor-researcher (strip preamble, keep body from <gray_area>)
rules.description: Replace task(subagent_type=general) advisor-researcher: strip preamble, keep body from <gray_area> onward

rules._comment: 19. Prose: 'All task() calls spawn simultaneously' → subagent reference
rules.description: Replace prose 'All task() calls spawn simultaneously' with subagent reference

rules._comment: 20. task(subagent_type="general", prompt="""...""") with triple-quoted prompt → @general
rules.description: Replace task(subagent_type=general, prompt=triple-quoted) with @general shorthand

rules._comment: 21. Agent() with skill(skill="gsd:xxx", ...) in prompt → @gsd-xxx shorthand
rules.description: Replace Agent() with gsd skill reference to @gsd-xxx shorthand, extracting agent name from skill="gsd:xxx" and converting to gsd-xxx

rules._comment: 22. Multiline task() with description first, then multiline prompt, no subagent_type (gsd-intel pattern)
rules.description: Replace task() with description + multiline prompt (no subagent_type) to @general shorthand

rules._comment: 23. Multiline task() with prompt, subagent_type, model with trailing comment (zh-CN example pattern)
rules.description: Replace task() with prompt, subagent_type, model (with optional trailing comment) to @subagent shorthand

rules._comment: 24. Multiline task() with description, run_in_background=true, then multiline prompt (manager.md pattern)
rules.description: Replace task() with description + run_in_background + multiline prompt to @general shorthand

rules._comment: 25. simple string with task()
rules.description: Replace string with task()
